---
title: "Yanping Weng"
image: 
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: yanping.weng@outlook.com
      href: mailto:yanping.weng@outlook.com
    - icon: github
      text: arlionn
      href: https://github.com/yan-ww
    - icon: book
      text: Google Scholar
      href: 
    - icon: fingerprint
      text: ORCID
      href: 
    - icon: brands zhihu
      text: 知乎
      href: 
    - icon: brands weibo
      text: 微博
      href: 
    - icon: brands xing
      text: 小红书
      href: 
    - icon: solid user
      text: 工作主页
      href: 
    - icon: 📝
      text: CV
      href: CV.pdf  
---

::: {#hero-heading}

Weng's research interests lie in the field of bioinformatics.


## Background

- Jun 2024 - Present: Bioinformatics Engineer, Geneplus company. 
- Sep 2021 - Jun 2024: Master in Bioinformatics, Fudan University.
- Sep 2017 - Jun 2021: Bachelor of Agriculture, China Agriculture University, China, majoring in Animal Science.

:::
